art_style.base: soft 3D Pixar-style render, rounded shapes, gentle rim lighting, no harsh shadows
art_style.render_quality: high-detail, cinematic depth of field, child-friendly
art_style.negative: no text, no watermark, no realistic gore, no scary faces, no fast strobing

color_palette.note: Keep these dominant in every shot for brand recognition.

Mimi.fur: warm orange (#FF8A65) with cream chest and inner ears
Mimi.proportions: big head, small body, toddler-like proportions

voice.en: bright young female, slightly breathy, warm

consistency_rules: Always describe the full character descriptor block in every Veo prompt.
Lock a single seed per character across an entire job.
Reference the same art_style.base string verbatim in every shot prompt.
Never let the camera show more than one new background element per scene.
